required_visual_ux_objectives.title: Pantalla principal de Content Engine Ω
required_visual_ux_objectives.purpose: Define the first visible screen without runtime execution.

required_visual_ux_objectives.title: Mapa visual 7L
required_visual_ux_objectives.purpose: Represent the seven interface layers, their status, and their dependency chain.

required_visual_ux_objectives.title: Sistema de paneles
required_visual_ux_objectives.purpose: Define how the seven panels are arranged, named, grouped and navigated.

required_visual_ux_objectives.title: Taxonomía visual de botones
required_visual_ux_objectives.purpose: Separate informational buttons, authorization buttons, blocked buttons, sandbox buttons and future productive buttons.

required_visual_ux_objectives.title: Superficie de autorización
required_visual_ux_objectives.purpose: Show pending, allowed, denied, fail-closed and user-confirmed states before any action.

required_visual_ux_objectives.title: Superficie de acciones bloqueadas
required_visual_ux_objectives.purpose: Make blocked actions visible and explain why they cannot run yet.

required_visual_ux_objectives.title: Evidencia e historial
required_visual_ux_objectives.purpose: Show reports, manifests, seals, summaries, commits and lifecycle state.

required_visual_ux_objectives.title: Zona ARGOS no-runtime
required_visual_ux_objectives.purpose: Reserve visual space for ARGOS status without enabling ARGOS runtime.

required_visual_ux_objectives.title: Estado global y seguridad
required_visual_ux_objectives.purpose: Show static build closed, visual pending, runtime blocked, ARGOS blocked, buttons blocked and productive actions blocked.

required_non_skip_route_before_runtime.purpose: Authorize runtime only after visual/UX blueprint and static mockup are closed.
